category_sources: Official Fourmilab page describes ent as a pseudorandom number sequence test program: https://www.fourmilab.ch/random/
source_facts.description says Pseudorandom number sequence test program.
display_name_sources: Official Fourmilab page uses the command name ent in NAME and description: https://www.fourmilab.ch/random/
docs_sources: Official Fourmilab page provides synopsis, description, options, output format, and source links: https://www.fourmilab.ch/random/.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/psm14/ent; per instruction, repo returned as null.
tags_sources: Official Fourmilab page says ent tests byte sequences for entropy, chi-square, arithmetic mean, Monte Carlo pi, and serial correlation: https://www.fourmilab.ch/random/.
source_facts.executables lists ent as a CLI executable.
